channel.title: supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: DocumentationCore Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: The central engine responsible for managing MDX content, project structure, and technical documentation layouts. Architectural overview of the DocumentationCore domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: OpenAPISpec Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Handles the ingestion and structural validation of the OpenAPI 3.x specification used to generate API references. Architectural overview of the OpenAPISpec domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ThemingEngine Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Manages the visual presentation and brand identity across the documentation portal. Architectural overview of the ThemingEngine domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
